info.title: Docmost API
info.description:
Docmost is an enterprise-ready collaborative wiki software for modern teams that you can self-host with full control over your data.

## Authentication

Pass an API key as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

## Response format

All endpoints use POST unless noted otherwise. Responses are wrapped as
`{ data, success, status }` except where noted (health, file downloads).

## Pagination

List endpoints return paginated results using cursor-based pagination. Pass an optional `limit` (1–100, default 20) to control page size. Cursors are opaque base64-encoded strings. The response shape is:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": {
    "items": [ ... ],
    "meta": {
      "limit": 20,
      "hasNextPage": true,
      "hasPrevPage": false,
      "nextCursor": "aWQ9MDE5OGVjMDYtZTAwY...",
      "prevCursor": null
    }
  }
}
```

To fetch the next page, pass the `nextCursor` value as `cursor` in your next request:

```json
{
  "limit": 20,
  "cursor": "aWQ9MDE5OGVjMDYtZTAwY..."
}
```

To go back, pass `prevCursor` as `cursor` instead.

## Enterprise features

Endpoints tagged **EE** require an enterprise license or cloud plan.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your Docmost instance (e.g. https://docs.example.com)

tags.name: Pages
tags.description: Page CRUD, history, and tree operations

400.description: Invalid invitation token or validation error

post.description: Requires Manage/Member permission. Not available on cloud.

List spaces the user has access to

200.description: Space info with member count and user membership
Paginated space members (users and groups in same list)

post.summary: Add users or groups to a space
Remove a user or group from a space
post.description: Requires Manage/Member space permission. Provide userId or groupId (not both).
Requires Manage/Member space permission. Provide userId or groupId (not both).

200.description: Page data with nested creator, lastUpdatedBy, contributors, and space
Updated page with nested creator, lastUpdatedBy, contributors, and space
Paginated recent pages with space info
Paginated deleted pages with deletedBy info

Move a page to a different space
Move a page within its space hierarchy

cursor.description: Set cursor to `nextCursor` returned by the previous call to list items in the next page.

200.description: Paginated comments with creator and resolvedBy

file.description: The file to upload. Images, documents, and other file types are supported.

pageId.description: ID of the page this attachment belongs to.

attachmentId.description: Optional pre-generated attachment ID. If omitted, a new ID is generated automatically.

post.summary: Upload a workspace/space icon or user avatar

file.description: Image file to upload (JPEG, PNG, etc.).

type.description: Type of image. `avatar`: user profile picture. `space_icon`: space logo. `workspace_icon`: workspace logo.

spaceId.description: Required when `type` is `space_icon`. Identifies which space to set the icon for.

get.summary: Get a workspace/space icon or user avatar

post.summary: Get search suggestions for pages, users, or groups
Search within a shared page tree

200.description: Paginated shares with page, space, and creator info
Shared page with share and creator info
Share details with shared page info

post.summary: Get the share for a specific page
Create a public share for a page
Get the page tree for a share (public)
Remove a user from a group
Export a page as HTML or Markdown zip
Export all pages in a space as zip
Import a single file (md, html, docx)

file.description: File to import. Supported formats: `.md` (Markdown), `.html` (HTML), `.docx` (Word document). Max 10 MB.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to import the page into.

parentPageId.description: ID of the parent page. If provided, the imported page is created as a child. If omitted, created at root level.

post.summary: Import a zip archive (Notion, Confluence, or generic)
post.description: Imports are processed asynchronously. Returns a file task that can be polled for progress.

file.description: ZIP archive containing pages to import.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to import pages into.

source.description: Source format of the zip contents. `notion`: Notion export (HTML or Markdown). `confluence`: Confluence space export (HTML format). `generic`: generic zip of Markdown or HTML files.

parentPageId.description: ID of the parent page. Imported pages are created as children of this page. If omitted, imported at root level.

post.summary: Generate MFA setup data (QR code and secret)
List workspaces the user has joined (Cloud only)

bearerAuth.description: API key token passed as Authorization: Bearer <token>. Create API keys via the API Keys endpoints (EE).

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

cursor.description: Set cursor to `nextCursor` returned by the previous call to list items in the next page.

query.description: Optional text filter to search within the listed items (e.g. filter members by name).

adminView.description: If `true`, the list includes all items the admin has global permissions to access by virtue of their admin role.

content.description: JSON content (ProseMirror document) or converted format

PageWithRelations.description: Page with conditionally included nested objects

DeletedPageWithRelations.description: Deleted page with deletedBy and space info

RecentPage.description: Recently viewed page with space info

PageHistoryWithRelations.description: Page history entry with nested user objects

CommentWithRelations.description: Comment with creator and resolvedBy user objects

ShareWithRelations.description: Share listing with nested page, space, and creator

ShareWithPage.description: Share with nested shared page info

SpaceWithMembership.description: Space with member count and user membership info

SpaceMemberItem.description: A space member entry (user or group)

WorkspaceWithMeta.description: Workspace with computed memberCount and hasLicenseKey

email.description: Account email address. Lookup is case-insensitive.

CreateAdminUserDto.description: Used during initial workspace setup to create the first admin account and workspace.

name.description: Display name for the admin user.

password.description: Admin password. Must be at least 8 characters.

workspaceName.description: Name for the workspace. If omitted, a default name is used.

hostname.description: Subdomain identifier for the workspace (e.g. `my-team`). Alphanumeric and hyphens only. If omitted, generated automatically.

oldPassword.description: Current password. Must match the stored password.

newPassword.description: New password. Must be at least 8 characters.

email.description: Email address of the account. A reset link is sent if the account exists (no error if it doesn't).

token.description: One-time password reset token from the email link.

newPassword.description: New password. Must be at least 8 characters.

avatarUrl.description: URL or filename of the user avatar image.

fullPageWidth.description: If `true`, the page editor uses the full browser width. If `false`, content is constrained to a max-width.

pageEditMode.description: Default page view mode. `read`: pages open in read-only mode. `edit`: pages open in edit mode.

locale.description: BCP 47 language tag for UI localization (e.g. `en`, `fr`, `ja`).

confirmPassword.description: Required when changing email or setting a password. Verifies the user's current password.

hostname.description: Subdomain identifier. Alphanumeric, lowercased. Changing this logs users out from the old hostname.

emailDomains.description: Allowed email domains for signup (e.g. `["example.com"]`). Used with SSO enforcement to restrict which email domains can join.

enforceSso.description: If `true`, traditional email/password login is disabled. All users must authenticate via a configured SSO provider.

enforceMfa.description: If `true`, all users are required to set up multi-factor authentication. Users without MFA are prompted to configure it on login.

restrictApiToAdmins.description: If `true`, only workspace admins can create and manage API keys. Regular members cannot create API keys.

generativeAi.description: Enable generative AI features such as content generation (EE).

disablePublicSharing.description: If `true`, disables public page sharing across the entire workspace. Overrides space-level sharing settings.

userId.description: ID of the user to remove from the workspace.
ID of the user whose role is being changed.

role.description: New workspace role. `owner`: full control. `admin`: manage workspace settings and members. `member`: basic access.

emails.description: Email addresses to invite. 1–50 emails per request. Users already in the workspace are skipped.

groupIds.description: Groups to automatically add invitees to when they accept the invitation. Optional.

role.description: Workspace role assigned to all invitees.

invitationId.description: ID of the invitation being accepted.

name.description: Display name for the new user account.

password.description: Password for the new user account.

token.description: Invitation token from the invitation email. Must match the stored token.

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier used in page URLs (e.g. `/s/my-space/page-slug`). Must be unique within the workspace. Alphanumeric and hyphens.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to update.

slug.description: New URL slug. Must be unique within the workspace.

disablePublicSharing.description: If `true`, prevents creation of public shares for pages in this space. Existing shares are deleted.

AddSpaceMembersDto.description: Add users and/or groups as members of a space. You can add both users and groups in a single request.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to add members to.

role.description: Role assigned to all added members. `admin`: full control within the space including managing members. `writer`: can create and edit pages. `reader`: read-only access to pages.

userIds.description: User IDs to add as space members. Users already in the space are skipped. Max 25 per request.

groupIds.description: Group IDs to add as space members. All users in the group inherit access to the space. Max 25 per request.

RemoveSpaceMemberDto.description: Remove a user or group from a space. Provide exactly one of `userId` or `groupId`.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to remove the member from.

userId.description: ID of the user to remove. Mutually exclusive with `groupId`.

groupId.description: ID of the group to remove. Mutually exclusive with `userId`.

UpdateSpaceMemberRoleDto.description: Change the role of a user or group in a space. Provide exactly one of `userId` or `groupId`.

userId.description: ID of the user whose role to change. Mutually exclusive with `groupId`.

groupId.description: ID of the group whose role to change. Mutually exclusive with `userId`.

role.description: New space role. `admin`: full control. `writer`: create and edit pages. `reader`: read-only.

includeSpace.description: If `true`, includes the space object (`id`, `name`, `slug`) in the response.

includeContent.description: If `true`, includes the page content body in the response. Omit or set to `false` when you only need page metadata.

format.description: Output format for the content field. `json` (default): ProseMirror document JSON. `markdown`: plain Markdown text. `html`: rendered HTML. Only applies when `includeContent` is `true`.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to create the page in.

icon.description: Emoji or icon string displayed alongside the page title.

parentPageId.description: ID of the parent page. If provided, creates the page as a child (sub-page). If omitted, creates a root-level page in the space.

content.description: Page body content. The expected type depends on `format`: `json` expects a ProseMirror document object, `markdown` expects a Markdown string, `html` expects an HTML string.

format.description: Format of the `content` field. Required when `content` is provided. `json`: ProseMirror document JSON object. `markdown`: Markdown text, converted to ProseMirror JSON on save. `html`: HTML text, converted to ProseMirror JSON on save.

pageId.description: ID of the page to update.

icon.description: New page icon (emoji or icon string).

content.description: New content to apply. The expected type depends on `format`: `json` expects a ProseMirror document object, `markdown` expects a Markdown string, `html` expects an HTML string. How the content is applied depends on `operation`.

format.description: Format of the `content` field. Required when `content` is provided. `json`: ProseMirror document JSON. `markdown`: Markdown text. `html`: HTML text. The response content will also be in this format.

operation.description: How to apply the new content to the existing page. `replace` (default): removes all existing content and inserts the new content. `append`: inserts the new content at the end of the existing document. `prepend`: inserts the new content at the beginning of the existing document.

pageId.description: ID of the page to delete.

permanentlyDelete.description: If `true`, permanently deletes the page and all its descendants from the database (requires space admin permission). If `false` (default), soft-deletes the page by setting `deletedAt` — it can be restored later from the trash.

historyId.description: ID of the page history entry to retrieve.

spaceId.description: Filter recent pages by space. If omitted, returns recent pages across all spaces the user has access to.
ID of the space whose deleted (trashed) pages to list.
Space to list pages for. Returns root-level pages when `pageId` is not provided.

pageId.description: Parent page ID. If provided, returns the children of this page for lazy-loading the sidebar tree.

MovePageDto.description: Reorder a page within its space hierarchy by changing its position and/or parent.

pageId.description: ID of the page to move.

position.description: Fractional index string that determines sort order among siblings. Generated by the client using fractional indexing.

parentPageId.description: New parent page ID. Set to `null` to move the page to root level. If omitted, the page keeps its current parent.

MovePageToSpaceDto.description: Move a page and all its descendants to a different space. The page becomes a root-level page in the destination space.

pageId.description: ID of the page to move. All child pages are moved with it.

DuplicatePageDto.description: Duplicate a page and optionally all its descendants. Creates copies with new IDs.

pageId.description: ID of the page to duplicate. All child pages are recursively duplicated.

spaceId.description: ID of the destination space. If omitted, duplicates into the same space as the original.

pageId.description: ID of the page to comment on.

content.description: Comment body as a JSON string (ProseMirror document format).

selection.description: The highlighted text that the comment refers to. Used for inline/contextual comments that anchor to a specific passage in the page.

parentCommentId.description: ID of a parent comment to reply to. If provided, creates a threaded reply. If omitted, creates a top-level comment.

commentId.description: ID of the comment to update.

content.description: New comment body as a JSON string (ProseMirror document format). Replaces the entire comment content.

type.description: Type of icon to remove. `avatar`: user profile avatar. `space_icon`: space logo. `workspace_icon`: workspace logo.

spaceId.description: Required when `type` is `space_icon`. Identifies which space icon to remove.

query.description: Full-text search query. Searches page titles and content.

spaceId.description: Restrict search results to a specific space. If omitted, searches across all spaces the user has access to.

creatorId.description: Filter results to pages created by a specific user.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

SearchSuggestionDto.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions across users, groups, and pages.

includeUsers.description: If `true`, includes matching users in the suggestions.

includeGroups.description: If `true`, includes matching groups in the suggestions.

includePages.description: If `true`, includes matching pages in the suggestions.

spaceId.description: Restrict page suggestions to a specific space.

limit.description: Maximum number of suggestions per category.

SearchShareDto.description: Search within the page tree of a public share. No authentication required.

shareId.description: ID of the share to search within. Results are restricted to pages in this share's page tree.

spaceId.description: Ignored — share search is scoped to the shared page tree regardless.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

pageId.description: ID of the page to share publicly.

includeSubPages.description: If `true`, the share includes the entire sub-page tree. Visitors can navigate child pages. If `false` (default), only the specified page is shared.

searchIndexing.description: If `true`, search engines are allowed to index the shared page (adds `index` meta tag). If `false` (default), adds `noindex` meta tag to prevent crawling.

shareId.description: ID of the share to update.

includeSubPages.description: If `true`, the share includes the entire sub-page tree. If `false`, only the root page is shared.

searchIndexing.description: If `true`, search engines can index the page. If `false`, adds `noindex` meta tag.

ShareInfoDto.description: Provide at least one of `shareId` or `pageId` to look up shared page info.

shareId.description: Share identifier. If the page has a direct share, look it up by this ID.

pageId.description: Page identifier. Resolves the share by traversing up the page tree to find an ancestor share with `includeSubPages` enabled.
ID of the page to find the share for.

userIds.description: User IDs to add as initial members when creating the group. Max 50.

groupId.description: ID of the group to update.
ID of the group to add users to.

userIds.description: User IDs to add to the group. 1–50 per request. Users already in the group are skipped.

groupId.description: ID of the group to remove the user from.

userId.description: ID of the user to remove.

pageId.description: ID of the page to export.

format.description: Export format. `html`: HTML files. `markdown`: Markdown (.md) files.

includeChildren.description: If `true`, exports the page and all its sub-pages recursively. If `false` (default), exports only the specified page.

includeAttachments.description: If `true`, includes file attachments (images, etc.) in the export archive. If `false` (default), only text content is exported.

spaceId.description: ID of the space to export. All pages in the space are included.

format.description: Export format. `html`: HTML files. `markdown`: Markdown (.md) files.

includeAttachments.description: If `true`, includes file attachments in the export archive. If `false` (default), only text content is exported.

fileTaskId.description: ID of the file task to check status for.

name.description: Display name for the API key (e.g. "CI/CD Pipeline").

expiresAt.description: Expiration date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. `2025-12-31T23:59:59Z`). If omitted, the key does not expire.

apiKeyId.description: ID of the API key to rename.
ID of the API key to revoke. Immediately deactivates the key.

secret.description: Base32-encoded TOTP secret from the MFA setup response. Must match the secret used to generate the QR code.

verificationCode.description: 6-digit TOTP code from the authenticator app. Verifies the user has correctly configured their authenticator.

code.description: 6-digit TOTP code from the authenticator app, or a one-time backup code.

confirmPassword.description: Current account password to confirm the action. Required for password-based accounts. Optional for SSO-only users.
Current account password to confirm the action. Required for password-based accounts. Optional for SSO-only users.

commentId.description: ID of the comment to resolve or unresolve.

resolved.description: Set to `true` to resolve the comment, `false` to unresolve it.

licenseKey.description: Enterprise license key. Validated against the Docmost license server.

CreateSsoProviderDto.description: Create an SSO provider. The required fields depend on the provider `type`.

name.description: Display name for the SSO provider (shown on the login page).

type.description: Provider type. `saml`: SAML 2.0 identity provider. `oidc`: OpenID Connect provider. `google`: Google OAuth (simplified OIDC). `ldap`: LDAP/Active Directory.

samlUrl.description: SAML: IdP metadata URL or SSO endpoint URL.

samlCertificate.description: SAML: X.509 certificate for signature verification (PEM format).

ldapUrl.description: LDAP: Server URL with protocol (`ldap://` or `ldaps://`).

ldapBindDn.description: LDAP: Bind Distinguished Name for connecting to the LDAP server.

ldapBaseDn.description: LDAP: Base DN for user search (e.g. `ou=users,dc=example,dc=com`).

ldapUserSearchFilter.description: LDAP: Search filter for locating users (e.g. `(uid={{username}})`).

ldapUserAttributes.description: LDAP: Attribute mapping for user fields (name, email). Maps LDAP attribute names to Docmost user fields.

ldapTlsEnabled.description: LDAP: If `true`, uses TLS for the connection.

ldapTlsCaCert.description: LDAP: CA certificate for TLS verification (PEM format).

allowSignup.description: If `true`, users authenticating via this provider for the first time are automatically created in the workspace.

isEnabled.description: If `true`, this provider is active and shown on the login page.

groupSync.description: If `true`, syncs group memberships from the SSO provider to Docmost groups.

UpdateSsoProviderDto.description: Update an SSO provider. All fields except `providerId` are optional.

providerId.description: ID of the SSO provider to update.

allowSignup.description: Allow or disallow automatic user creation.

CreateCloudWorkspaceDto.description: Create a new workspace on the cloud platform.
